page: Microsoft Azure D2lds_v7 is a compute-optimized virtual machine from the Dldsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. This configuration provides 2 vCPUs derived from 1 physical core with 2 threads. The hardware profile includes a low-memory allocation of 4.0 GB RAM, translating to 2.0 GB per core, alongside 118 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities.

Performance benchmarks reveal a mixed capability profile. The processor demonstrates strong single-threaded performance, achieving top-tier results in gzip compression at 35.35 GB/sec and strong results in bzip3 decompression at 14.66 GB/sec. However, memory bandwidth is a notable bottleneck, with uncached read-only large block bandwidth at 24.65 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 12.55 GB/sec, both ranking in the lower tiers. This memory constraint is also reflected in weak Redis SET operations at 4.21 million operations per second and static web serving throughput at 4.9 GB/sec.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D2lds_v7 offers a resource-dense option for workloads that require dedicated high-frequency CPU cycles but have minimal memory requirements. The inclusion of 118 GB of local storage provides a built-in storage buffer without needing external attachments. This server is best suited for lightweight compute-heavy tasks, single-threaded file compression, basic web serving, or entry-level LLM text generation where memory capacity is not a limiting factor.
description: Microsoft Azure D2lds_v7 is a compute-optimized virtual machine from the Dldsv7 family, featuring 2 vCPUs and 4.0 GB of RAM. Powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz, this x86_64 instance includes 118 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. Benchmark data highlights strong single-threaded performance, with top-tier gzip compression at 35.35 GB/sec and strong bzip3 decompression. However, memory bandwidth is limited, with uncached write speeds at 12.55 GB/sec and read speeds at 24.65 GB/sec, which impacts memory-bound tasks like Redis SET operations. This resource profile makes the instance highly cost-efficient for CPU-heavy, low-memory workloads. It is best suited for lightweight compute tasks, single-threaded data compression, and basic web serving where memory capacity is not a limiting factor.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2lds_v7 is a compute-optimized virtual machine featuring 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and 118 GB local storage, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor for high-speed single-threaded compression tasks.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2lds_v7 is a compute-optimized VM with 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon CPU, ideal for low-memory, high-compute workloads.
tagline: A low-memory, compute-focused virtual machine featuring high-frequency Intel Xeon processing and integrated local storage for efficient single-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz
2 vCPUs paired with a low-memory allocation of 4.0 GB RAM
118 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier single-threaded gzip compression performance at 35.35 GB/sec
Best suited for lightweight compute, file compression, and basic web serving
